babyDevelopment: Congratulations! You've reached your due date. The baby is fully developed and ready to meet you. Only about 5% of babies are born on their actual due date, so don't be discouraged if you're still waiting. The baby is mostly and head-down.
bodyChanges: You might feel very heavy, tired, and ready for labor to begin. Your cervix is likely ready for birth. Braxton Hicks and real contractions may be difficult to distinguish now. Stay in close contact with your healthcare provider.
tips: Rest as much as possible before the big event

do: Follow all instructions from your doctor
Keep your hospital bag ready by the door
dont: Worry if you go slightly past your due date

warningSignsToWatch: Regular, painful contractions that get stronger
Sudden severe headache or vision changes
milestoneDescription: Your journey is reaching its beautiful climax. Get ready to meet your baby!
